summary: Converted several Dolphin GX routines from large inline assembly blocks into C or near-matching C, mainly in GXAttr, GXLight, and GXFrameBuf. The PR removed jump-table-heavy asm for GXSetVtxDesc and GXSetVtxAttrFmt, added C implementations for GXSetArray, GXSetNumTexGens, GXClearBoundingBox, GXSetChanAmbColor, and GXSetChanMatColor, improved scratch match percentages for some remaining asm, and adjusted GX context struct field types/offsets to support the new C code. There was no PR body or review discussion; evidence is from the diff and one approval.
what_changed: Replaced the inline-asm GXSetVtxDesc implementation with a C switch over vertex descriptor IDs, using INSERT_FIELD on __GXContexts.main->x14 and x18 and preserving special handling for cases 10 and 25 via x41C, x41D, and x418.
Replaced inline-asm GXSetVtxAttrFmt with a C switch that writes VAT fields into x1C_data, x3C_data, and x5C_data, then sets x4F0_flags |= 0x10 and marks x4EE for the changed VAT index.
Added a C NON_MATCHING version of __GXSetVAT guarded by #ifdef NON_MATCHING, while retaining the matching asm version because the diff notes remaining regswaps and the scratch is still 80 bytes off.

Replaced inline-asm GXSetArray with C that writes CP register commands through WGPIPE, masks the base address with 0x3FFFFFFF, handles attr 0x19 as 0xA, and caches relevant array bases/strides in x88_data and x98_data.
Replaced inline-asm GXSetNumTexGens with C that updates x204 using INSERT_FIELD, writes XF register 0x103F through WGPIPE, and sets x4F0_flags |= 4.
Replaced inline-asm GXClearBoundingBox with C writing BP registers 0x550003FF and 0x560003FF through WGPIPE and clearing the context dirty flag via set_x2(GX_FALSE).

Replaced inline-asm GXSetChanAmbColor and GXSetChanMatColor with C switch implementations over GX channel IDs, packing GXColor components into cached u32 ambient/material color words and writing XF registers 0x100A/0x100B and 0x100C/0x100D.

Adjusted __types.h GX context fields: x88_data and x98_data became u32[4] instead of byte arrays, ambColors and matColors became u32[2] instead of GXColor[2], and x418 was exposed as a u32 before x41C/x41D.
Removed obsolete local label declarations and jump tables for C-converted GXAttr functions, while keeping jump tables still needed by remaining asm blocks.
smart_moves: Used INSERT_FIELD to express repeated rlwinm/or bitfield updates, making many formerly label-heavy assembly paths readable without losing the hardware register bit layout.
Preserved behavior for the GXSetVtxDesc special cases 10 and 25 by modeling the context flags x41C/x41D and shared value x418 before recomputing bits 11-12 of x14.
Changed context cache fields to u32 where the C code naturally treats them as packed hardware register words, which made color packing and CP array cache writes cleaner and offset-consistent.
Kept __GXSetVAT asm as the active implementation and put the readable C version under NON_MATCHING, avoiding a forced nonmatching regression while documenting the intended high-level logic.
Centralized WGPIPE writes in C for simple register-write routines, showing direct correspondence between GX_LOAD_CP_REG, GX_LOAD_XF_REG, GX_LOAD_BP_REG and the original FIFO stores.
For channel color setters, reused cached context values when only RGB or alpha is being changed, matching the original partial-update behavior instead of overwriting unrelated color components.
decomp_lessons: Large GX jump-table asm blocks can often become ordinary C switch statements when the switch discriminant and bitfield destinations are identified.

Before converting code that writes into context offsets, update the GX context struct to expose the true storage width; byte-array placeholders can hide that the code is caching packed u32 register values.
Hardware color structs passed as GXColor may still be cached internally as packed u32 register words; decomp should distinguish API-facing types from context storage types.
When a readable C translation is close but still has register allocation differences, use NON_MATCHING to keep the knowledge without sacrificing the matched build.
FIFO write routines are good candidates for C once command constants and register addresses are identified, because the original asm usually maps directly to WGPIPE writes.
Maintain dirty flags after context updates; this PR repeatedly sets x4F0_flags bits or calls set_x2 after updating GX state.
naming_conventions: GX API functions keep official Dolphin names such as GXSetVtxDesc, GXSetVtxAttrFmt, GXSetArray, GXSetNumTexGens, GXClearBoundingBox, GXSetChanAmbColor, and GXSetChanMatColor.
Unknown GX context fields use offset-derived names such as x14, x18, x418, x41C, x41D, x4EE, and x4F0_flags.
Context arrays that correspond to offsets are named with offset prefixes, for example x1C_data, x3C_data, x5C_data, x88_data, and x98_data.
Semantically identified packed color caches use ambColors and matColors even though their element type is u32 rather than GXColor.
Remaining anonymous assembly labels and jump tables retain lbl_8033.... and jtbl_8040.... names when still referenced by asm.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Replaced bctr jump-table assemblies with C switch statements while preserving sparse or special cases, notably GXSetVtxDesc case 25 and GXSetVtxAttrFmt cases 10/25.
Mapped repeated rlwinm/rlwimi patterns to INSERT_FIELD(destination, value, width, shift).
Modeled memory-mapped FIFO stores with WGPIPE.u8 and WGPIPE.u32 writes and GX_LOAD_CP_REG, GX_LOAD_XF_REG, GX_LOAD_BP_REG constants.
Used bit masks and explicit casts where the asm required exact byte/word behavior, such as arg1 & 0x3FFFFFFF in GXSetArray and (u8)(1 << (u8)arg0) for x4EE.
Left __GXSetVAT under asm for matching while documenting the C loop over 8 VAT entries that writes CP registers 0x70/0x80/0x90 plus the index.
Decomp scratch comments show improved matching status for some routines, including __GXXfVtxSpecs moving from 3435 bytes off to 95 bytes off and GXSetTexCoordGen2 from 3315 to 640 bytes off.
review_feedback: No issue comments or review comments were present in the PR slice.
One collaborator review by ribbanya approved the PR without a written body.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that finish matching __GXSetVAT and remove the NON_MATCHING-only C version.
Find later GX context struct cleanup that gives semantic names to x14, x18, x1C_data, x3C_data, x5C_data, x4EE, and x4F0_flags.
Search for PRs that further decompile GXSetTexCoordGen2 after scratch 9TphI remained 640 bytes off.
Search for other GX PRs that convert FIFO write asm to WGPIPE-based C.
Compare later color-channel decomp work to this packed u32 ambColors/matColors approach.
